title: Form missing #[derive(PartialEq)]
description: form.rs: Form derives Debug and Clone but not PartialEq. Token (lexer.rs) derives PartialEq. The inconsistency forces every test that inspects a Form to use the verbose matches! macro workaround (lib.rs lines 298-311) instead of assert_eq!. Since Form contains only String, u64, Vec<String>, Vec<Stmt>, and Vec<Form>, deriving PartialEq requires no manual implementation. The omission is not justified and makes test assertions unclear.
